Flu: Stay hydrated and rest. Consult a doctor if fever persists for more than 3 days.
Migraine: Avoid bright lights and loud noise; rest in a quiet dark room. Seek care if pain is severe.
Pneumonia: Seek medical attention for chest pain or difficulty breathing.
Healthy: No concerning symptoms detected. Maintain a healthy lifestyle.
COVID-19: Isolate, get tested, and contact a healthcare provider if symptoms worsen.
